with open(hfile,'r') as f:
    hadith=json.load(f)
len(hadith)

# Explore fields
hadith[0].keys()[:20], hadith[0]
list(hadith[0].keys())

def normalize(s):
    if s is None: return ""
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not unicodedata.combining(unicodedata.normalize('NFD', ch)))
    # unify alef/hamza forms
    s = re.sub('[إأآٱا]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('ى', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ؤ', 'و', s)
    s = re.sub('ئ', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ة', 'ه', s)
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]+', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

snippet_full = "أَلاَ تَغَرَّضوا بِالنِسَاءِ وَلاَ تَجَشَّموا بِهِنَّ"
norm_snip = normalize(snippet_full)
norm_snip

# bug: unicodedata.normalize expects string, but ch is a character string. combining expects a char
def normalize(s):
    if s is None: return ""
    s = unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s)
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not unicodedata.combining(ch))
    s = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', s)
    s = re.sub('[إأآٱا]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('ى', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ؤ', 'و', s)
    s = re.sub('ئ', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ة', 'ه', s)
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]+', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_snip = normalize(snippet_full)
norm_snip

# search hadith texts that contain similar tokens
def score(text):
    t = normalize(text)
    # Jaccard on tokens
    set_snip=set(norm_snip.split())
    set_t=set(t.split())
    j=len(set_snip & set_t)/len(set_snip | set_t) if set_snip|set_t else 0
    # LCS ratio via SequenceMatcher
    ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm_snip, t).ratio()
    return j*0.4 + ratio*0.6

cands=[]
for rec in hadith:
    for field in ('hadithTxt','Matn'):
        txt=rec.get(field)
        if txt:
            s=score(txt)
            if s>0.4:
                cands.append((s, txt))
cands=sorted(cands, key=lambda x:-x[0])[:20]
len(cands)
